title: Implement retry helper with tests
instruction:
This workspace has a broken `api.js` that calls `fetchWithRetry` which does not exist yet.

1. Create `retry.js` exporting `fetchWithRetry(url, maxAttempts)` that retries failed fetches up to maxAttempts.
2. Update `api.js` to import from `./retry.js`.
3. Run `node test.js` and make it pass.
4. Do not modify `test.js`.
